name: Meatloaf Bracciole
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water to mushroom liquid to make 1/2 cup.
2. Combine beef with 1/2 cup breadcrumbs, egg, reserved mushroom liquid, garlic powder, and salt. Refrigerate.
3. Crumble bacon. Mix parsley, oregano, basil, thyme, and additional bread crumbs.
4. Pat meat mixture into a 12" x 8-inch rectangle on waxed paper.
5. Drizzle reserved grease over the meat. Sprinkle with herb mixture, then add bacon, onion, mushrooms, and cheese.
6. Starting with the short end, roll the meat into a jelly-roll shape using the waxed paper as a guide.
7. Place the seam-side down in a 13" x 9" x 2-inch baking dish. Pour tomato sauce over, cover with foil, and bake for 50-60 minutes at 350°F.
